title: paeonia × suffruticosa f. anneslei
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa f. anneslei, also known as Paeonia Anneslei, is a cultivar of the Paeonia × suffruticosa species, a type of perennial flowering plant in the peony family (Paeoniaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Paeonia Anneslei include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, alleviate menstrual cramps, and promote relaxation and sleep. Paeonia Anneslei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from the roots, flowers, or leaves of the plant.
